title: Test Plan Unit
description: Schema that describes a Checkbox Test Plan unit

id.title: ID (Test Plan Unit)
id.description: Unique identifier of the test plan.

name.title: Name (Test Plan Unit)
name.description: Human-readable name of the test plan, used for display purposes.

description.title: Description (Test Plan Unit)
description.description: Human-readable description of the test plan.

include.title: Include (Test Plan Unit)
include.description: List of job identifiers or patterns to include for execution.

mandatory_include.title: Mandatory Include (Test Plan Unit)
mandatory_include.description: List of job identifiers or patterns that must always be executed.

bootstrap_include.title: Bootstrap Include (Test Plan Unit)
bootstrap_include.description: List of job identifiers to run before the main phase of the testing.

setup_include.title: Setup Include (Test Plan Unit)
setup_include.description: List of job identifiers to run during the setup phase.

nested_part.title: Nested Part (Test Plan Unit)
nested_part.description: List of test plan identifiers whose contents will become part of this test plan.

exclude.title: Exclude (Test Plan Unit)
exclude.description: List of job identifiers or patterns to exclude from execution.

category_overrides.title: Category Overrides (Test Plan Unit)
category_overrides.description: List of category override statements for job definitions.

certification_status_overrides.title: Certification Status Overrides (Test Plan Unit)
certification_status_overrides.description: List of certification status override statements for job definitions.

estimated_duration.title: Estimated Duration (Test Plan Unit)
estimated_duration.description: Estimated test plan duration as a float in seconds or a duration string (e.g. 1h 2m 30s).
